title: Local Outreach to Suicide Survivors (LOSS)
text:
Local Outreach to Suicide Survivors (LOSS) - SupportGoWhere
Local Outreach to Suicide Survivors (LOSS)
Share link
Provides immediate and long-term emotional support to those who have lost a loved one or someone they knew to suicide.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

LOSS Programme comprises:

Support group for persons bereaved by suicide




SOS professional staff trained in grief work and trained volunteers will provide emotional support through email, phone calls, SMSes and counselling sessions (if necessary) to those who lost a loved one or someone they knew to suicide.




SOS also serves individuals referred from community partners (i.e. police, hospitals, SSAs) or concerned third party.




Who is this for?

Persons bereaved by suicide

What to expect?

When you reach out to SOS via call, text or email, SOS staff or trained volunteer will provide emotional support and if needed, encourage you to come for grief counselling and attend support groups subsequently for longer term support.

How to apply?

Reach out to SOS via 24/7 hotline: 1767; CAREmail: pat@sos.org.sg; and Care Text: WhatsApp 9151 1767

Information last updated on 22 Oct 2025
